channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Solana (SOL) gains 5.6%, leading index higher
item.description: Aave (AAVE) joined Solana (SOL) as a top performer, rising 5% from Tuesday.

item.title: Bitcoin is a real-time sentiment gauge for weekend warmongering
item.description: Bitcoin reacted to Iran war news while stock markets were closed, showing how crypto is becoming a real-time gauge of macro risk.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: UK House of Lords presses Coinbase exec on stablecoins, KYC and bank run fears
item.description: Lawmakers asked if stablecoins could drain bank deposits and threaten financial stability, while Coinbase and Innovate Finance warned that strict regulation risks driving innovation offshore.

item.title: Ex-Binance communications lead joins stablecoin specialist KAST
item.description: Brad Jaffe, the former global communications leader at Binance, becomes chief communications officer at KAST.

item.title: Sui’s native stablecoin goes live with promise of Treasury yield going back to the network
item.description: Plans for a Sui Dollar, which is issued by stablecoin firm Bridge, were introduced toward the end of last year.

item.title: Stablecoin giant Tether invests $50 million in sleep technology startup Eight Sleep
item.description: The firm behind the $183 billion USDT stablecoin is expanding beyond its crypto roots to longevity and artificial intelligence.

item.title: Morning Minute: CFTC Chair Says U.S. Perpetual Futures Are Coming
item.description: Perp trading volumes are likely set to explode on this news—but what does that mean for the onchain perps leader?

item.title: Trump’s crypto adviser rejects Dimon on treating yield-bearing stablecoins like banks
item.description: White House adviser Patrick Witt said yield-bearing stablecoins needn't to face bank rules because the Genius Act bars issuers from lending reserves.

item.title: South Korea moves to cap crypto exchange shareholder stakes at 20%: Report
item.description: South Korea’s government and ruling party reportedly agreed on a proposal to cap major shareholder stakes in crypto exchanges at 20%, with limited exemptions for new operators.

item.title: Market infrastructure firms warn tokenized securities face higher costs, split liquidity without interoperability
item.description: The DTCC, Euroclear and Clearstream argue that the principle of “same asset, same rights, same outcome” must apply across both distributed ledger technology networks and traditional finance systems.

item.title: XRP price breakout targets $1.95 amid five-day ETF inflow streak
item.description: XRP analysts highlighted the potential for a rebound to $1.95 as the price broke above a symmetrical triangle amid persistent institutional demand.

item.title: Kraken Secures Access to Fed’s Core Payment Systems: WSJ
item.description: Kraken’s banking unit has won approval for a Federal Reserve “master account,” enabling it to move money on existing financial rails.

item.title: Another solid inflow day for the bitcoin ETFs. Almost all now net positive flows YTD. Amazing considering it's down 22% on year, 50% total decline. Crypto Twitter: call your parents, tell them thank you and that you love them and that you totally underestimated t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5YSUdQaUVGSU1fWjVMRDF2ejFVYmh6UjBjZ1FFV1d4cFdRYm1ES3RWeWtxUEZhbFZrc1pRUGxsZDJvaXA3R0w0NTdGbUNCMC1RUEdVSm15cnlwZGRvX3p6Nlo0VEc?oc=5" target="_blank">Another solid inflow day for th…

item.title: Here's why bitcoin climbed through $71,000
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 4, 2026

item.title: Morgan Stanley taps Coinbase and BNY for custody in proposed Bitcoin ETF
item.description: BNY to act as administrator, transfer agent and cash custodian for Morgan Stanley’s proposed Bitcoin Trust.

item.title: Three Bitcoin signals show $80K is next BTC price target for bulls
item.description: A symmetrical triangle breakout and an unfilled CME gap are boosting the case that Bitcoin may revisit $80,000 in March.

item.title: Bitcoin Pushes Past $71K, But Can the Rally Last?
item.description: Positioning resets and liquidity expectations have seen Bitcoin retest $71,000 amid the escalating conflict in the Middle East.

item.title: Kraken wins Kansas City Fed approval for limited master account access
item.description: In a first for crypto, Kraken’s banking unit gained access to the US Federal Reserve’s payment system, Fedwire, though without full banking privileges such as interest on reserves.

item.title: Bitcoin hits one-month high near $72,000 as haven demand rises
item.description: BTC jumped to $71,800 as investors turned to haven assets in light of the escalating Middle East conflict and renewed strength in altcoins.

item.title: Iran’s largest crypto exchange shows no clear signs of capital flight: TRM
item.description: TRM said a post-strike spike in Nobitex wallet activity looked like routine liquidity moves, even as Chainalysis flagged higher outflows from Iranian exchanges overall.

item.title: Kraken becomes first crypto company to secure Fed master account access: WSJ
item.description: The approval lets Kraken speed up deposits and withdrawals for large traders and institutional clients, but is limited.

item.title: 🚨NEW: @krakenfx, the U.S.’s second-largest crypto exchange, has just done something no other crypto firm has done before: secured coveted access to the Federal Reserve. According to a report by the @WSJ released this morning, the exchange’s banking a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5QYUF3N3Y0Z1FKMTgtR3dwczBjdWlMMEhSYU5uQWdpcGVHbnJFNi1EbzRYNDlxMVZtZE1naC1QTk9zVDAzX1lDVTB3ZE5NbWxwdXctUGtUS2E5Vmh1N3JhaGgtU3gzUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: @krakenfx, the U.S.’s…

item.title: FATF flags stablecoin P2P transfers as sanctions evasion risk
item.description: The international watchdog says P2P stablecoin transfers via self-custody wallets can bypass AML checks and urges countries to assess risks and apply proportionate safeguards.

item.title: BREAKING: @krakenfx just became the first crypto firm to gain access to the Federal Reserve's core payments system, putting it on the same payment rails as thousands of U.S. banks and credit unions. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9EWEhhR1NTUURiM0NBX09WMWZ5U25RU0FtRW13Y0pRSXF2b2pFVDN1alBYU3VfaWhXb3AtazRBMmtNb1RFaVNHTERsNjltVTBFVTNjZktZYUloOXhodFE?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: @krakenfx just became the fir…

item.title: Strategy’s STRC stock signals 1,000 BTC purchase in biggest-one day issuance since debut
item.description: Surging trading volume in STRC suggests strong bitcoin buying by the largest publicly traded holder of the cryptocurrency.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin surges above $71,000 and hits its highest level since February 8th. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE93M0haSkhjOTF6dnBVcWo3RlhfRzhIMVIwMklPSUJrYWp2bVJoZHFYdy01ZmhRc3BHVU94QVIxT2ZBdlJFQVFleEZNN0Q5eUhsajZRUDBiTXdzVlBzWHBQdXFfazVRdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin surges abo…

item.title: JUST IN: South Korea to cap crypto exchange ownership stakes at 20%, with a three-year grace period for @Official_Upbit and @BithumbOfficial. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1LVm1RaVZoajJKNHFYN0hsQ2dJN0EtTTVyUkVETThycmxZRDBEeFhUWFVNcnpPbU9fTjJmdXY4YzRWRGllRndjRU1JSkwwR2pQTXZJQ1Foc2d2WE9wclE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: South Korea to cap crypto exch…

item.title: Ex-OpenAI researcher’s hedge fund reveals big Bitcoin miner bets in new SEC filing
item.description: Leopold Aschenbrenner’s hedge fund Situational Awareness LP has scaled to $5.52 billion in equity exposure in less than a year by betting on power, data centers and Bitcoin miners.

item.title: Bitcoin price nears one-month high as bulls propel BTC toward $72K
item.description: BTC price upside returned during Wednesday's Asia trading session as Bitcoin attacked a long-term trend line and psychological levels.

item.title: The foundations for crypto have never been stronger. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1ZLU5Vdm9odDBKdUpWN2M0aFZhS2R3RlI3MHhXeHFXMHVLekJNN2tiTE1Nb0hhUmVBMlVkSTgxbDVPa0dsVGhRSzFrLVZraUcwRDVEUWZhRTBXejVveGYwcDl1VmVCc2c?oc=5" target="_blank">The foundations for crypto …

item.title: Bitcoin jumps above $71,000, building on its resilience to Middle East conflict
item.description: Bitcoin climbed above $71,000, gaining more than 6% in 24 hours and leading broad advances in major cryptocurrencies.

item.title: X introduces 90-day revenue-sharing ban for undisclosed AI war videos
item.description: Creators posting AI-generated war footage without disclosure risk losing access to X’s revenue-sharing program for three months.

item.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs add $225M as BlackRock’s IBIT offsets redemptions
item.description: BlackRock’s spot Bitcoin ETF drew $322 million in inflows Tuesday, offsetting outflows from rival funds including Fidelity and Grayscale.

item.title: Cathie Wood’s Ark loads up on Coinbase, Robinhood as stocks slide on Iran conflict
item.description: The purchases came as geopolitical tensions tied to the US and Israel's conflict with Iran weighed on global markets, pushing major indexes lower.

item.title: Ray Dalio says 'there is only one gold' as bitcoin outperforms gold during worst geopolitical crisis in years
item.description: The Bridgewater founder dismissed bitcoin's safe-haven credentials on the same day gold dropped 3% while bitcoin fell less than 1%.

item.title: Over a billion flows into bitcoin ETFs, yet the price isn’t rising — an analyst explains why
item.description: Bitfinex analyst argue that ETF inflows can be misread as immediate spot demand.

item.title: Korea halts trading as key indexes drop 10% on Middle East crisis
item.description: South Korea’s Kospi and Kosdaq tripped circuit breakers as the Middle East conflict drove a global exodus from stocks.

item.title: Former LAPD officer convicted of kidnapping teen in $350K crypto robbery
item.description: Former Los Angeles Police Department officer Eric Halem was convicted of handcuffing and threatening to kill a teenager to steal Bitcoin.

item.title: Indiana governor signs bill allowing crypto in retirement plans
item.description: House Bill 1042 also includes provisions to protect the rights of crypto users, barring public agencies from enforcing rules that ban crypto payments, self-custody, or mining.

item.title: Polymarket Pulls Nuclear Detonation Market Following Public Backlash
item.description: War betting, insider trading accusations, and a list of overseas bans are piling pressure on the prediction market giant.

item.title: Bitcoin holds, ether, solana slide as Mideast woes drag Asian equities to multi-year lows
item.description: The largest cryptocurrency briefly reclaimed the top of its range on Tuesday before sellers pushed it back to $67,000, while South Korean stocks posted their worst two-day drop since 2008.

item.title: Ripple expands payments platform into end-to-end stablecoin infrastructure as processed volume tops $100 billion
item.description: The company added managed custody, virtual account collections, and fiat-to-stablecoin settlement capabilities, positioning itself as a single provider for enterprise digital asset payments across 60 markets.

item.title: TradFi to adopt 24/7 crypto rails sooner than expected: Bitwise
item.description: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan called it the “weekend that changed finance” as investors clambered onto Hyperliquid to trade the Israel-Iran conflict.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin Urges Ethereum to Broaden Its Mission Beyond Finance
item.description: Ethereum’s co-founder is calling for “sanctuary technologies” spanning privacy tools, social systems, and infrastructure beyond finance.

item.title: Polymarket shelves nuclear detonation markets after outcry
item.description: Nuclear weapon-themed markets aren’t new on the prediction market platform, but public outcry about the contracts has apparently forced the platform to delete them.

item.title: AI agents overwhelmingly prefer Bitcoin over fiat in new study
item.description: A Bitcoin Policy Institute study of 36 AI models found Bitcoin was the top monetary choice in 48% of responses, but more than half preferred stablecoins for payment scenarios.

item.title: Trump’s ex-crypto advisor: US government must go beyond ‘liking Bitcoin’
item.description: Bitcoin will eventually reach a point where the US government creates the conditions it needs to succeed, whether that takes 10 or 20 years, according to a Bitcoin executive.

item.title: Corporates and Exchanges Rush to Stake Ethereum Instead of Selling
item.description: Analysts say large investors are increasingly locking up ETH for yield rather than positioning to sell into market rallies.

item.title: Bitcoin rebounds toward $70,000 as ETFs pull in $1.45 billion in five days
item.description: Market maker Enflux says traders are not pricing catastrophe or resolution to the conflict in the Middle East, while Glassnode data shows improving spot demand but cautious derivatives positioning.

item.title: AI Models Prefer Bitcoin Over Fiat and Stablecoins, Study Finds
item.description: Bitcoin Policy Institute study finds AI systems, including Claude, GPT, Grok, and Gemini, favored Bitcoin over fiat and other digital assets.

item.title: Colombian Court Rejects Appeal for AI Writing, Then Gets Flagged By Its Own AI Detector
item.description: Colombia's top criminal court cited AI detectors to reject a lawyer's appeal. An attorney then ran the court's ruling through the same software and got a 93% match.

item.title: X Warns Against Creator Payouts Over Undisclosed AI War Videos
item.description: X’s head of product, Nikita Bier, says creators posting AI-generated war videos without disclosure will lose access to X’s revenue-sharing program.

item.title: Trump Urges Congress to Move on Crypto Rules Amid Banking Clash
item.description: The dispute centers on whether crypto firms should be allowed to offer stablecoin yield, an issue that has stalled key negotiations.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC Chair Mike Selig says crypto market structure legislation "must pass." "It's critical we have a future-proof digital asset market structure in place." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9wbEpGT1kwVTNZaXFPV25LWlBMZTlLYlBTdHl5RnM1MTlSblQzQ205SkVjSk1vdlVqYkJScGkzMnhlTWRpVXVEVE9KTGk1ZFJ4UmVjZExSOXJkWEc1V0I2c19B?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC Chair Mike Seli…

item.title: Trump urges passage of U.S. Clarity Act, attacks banks for 'undercutting' GENIUS
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said in a post on Truth Social that the banking industry is trying to undermine the stablecoin bill he signed into law last year.

item.title: South Koreans Paid in Crypto for 'Revenge' Attacks Involving Human Waste, Say Police: Report
item.description: Police in South Korea have arrested people in a "revenge" group that were paid in crypto to make threats and vandalize property, per a local report.

item.title: JP Morgan CEO Jamie Dimon says stablecoin issuers paying interest should be regulated as banks
item.description: Dimon argued stablecoin issuers paying interest should meet bank standards as talks continue in Washington about the CLARITY Act.

item.title: JUST IN: Indiana Governor signs bill into law that allows Bitcoin to be invested in state retirement plans 🇺🇸 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE12bTB5U3ZROWlFX2tDVlgyS2VxOU50ZjBfOVNMMlpkSkdxdUVueXdWRU9yakVESG9VNktZbl84TlRrdS0xb2ZvMmU0MW5zVmowOEc5UzZRSjdya2UzLUlFek9zdzg1MTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Indiana Governor s…

item.title: 'More Accurate, Less Cringe': OpenAI Rolls Out GPT-5.3 Instant in ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI's latest ChatGPT update targets tone and accuracy, aiming to make everyday AI conversations smoother and more useful.
